description: The system MUST respond to user input within 2 seconds.
title: Performance

description: The system SHALL be available 99.99% of the time.
title: Reliability

description: The system MUST protect user data and MUST NOT store sensitive information.
title: Security

description: The system MUST NOT collect or store user data without consent.
title: Privacy

description: The system SHOULD be able to handle 1000 concurrent users.
title: Scalability

description: The system MUST be user-friendly and MUST provide clear instructions.
title: Usability

description: The system SHOULD be easy to modify and update.
title: Maintainability

description: The system MUST be compatible with major web browsers.
title: Compatibility

description: The system MUST integrate with HR module from Odoo ERP software.
title: Integration
